news_items.headline: Mad Dog can't contain his disgust at the Marlins
news_items.description: Chris "Mad Dog" Russo sounds off on the Marlins for not allowing catchers to call pitches.

news_items.headline: Blue Jays' minor league affiliate scores 8 runs without a hit
news_items.description: Toronto's Double-A team in the Eastern League scored eight runs in the second inning before getting its first hit of the game.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
news_items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
news_items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.

news_items.headline: Stephen A. on Braves and Angels' brawl: 'I loved it'
news_items.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to the bench-clearing brawl between the Braves and Angels.

news_items.headline: How to watch MLB.TV on ESPN
news_items.description: Check out how you can watch over 2000 out-of-market games through ESPN this MLB season.
